ddls:
CREATE TABLE "event_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event segment */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the associated event */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event segment */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event segment */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the event segment (e.g., Pre-Arrival, Arrival) */,
  "nth_instance" INTEGER /* Instance number of the event segment */,
  "num_descriptors" INTEGER /* Number of descriptors associated with the segment */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the segment takes place */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the segment */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the segment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* When the segment was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the segment */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* When the segment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_segments_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_segments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("username"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_segments_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("username")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the event category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code for the category */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon for the category */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* When the category was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the category */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* When the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_categories_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("username"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_categories_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("username")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_descriptors" (
  "descriptor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each descriptor */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event segment this descriptor relates to */,
  "descriptor_text" TEXT /* Textual representation of the descriptor */,
  "descriptor_type" TEXT /* Type of the descriptor (e.g., general, technical, attendee-related) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the descriptor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* When the descriptor was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the descriptor */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* When the descriptor was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("descriptor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_descriptors_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("username"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_descriptors_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("username"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_descriptors_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES event_segments ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* When the event was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the event */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* When the event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("username"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("username")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coordinator, manager, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* When the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* When the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (comma-separated list or JSON) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* When the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* When the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
